fields.title: Set up project repository
fields.description: Initialize the Django and React repositories with a base folder structure.

fields.title: Design Task model
fields.description: Define the Task model with title, description, status, and created_at fields.

fields.title: Build Task list API
fields.description: Implement GET /api/tasks/ with optional status filtering.

fields.title: Build React task form
fields.description: Create a form to add new tasks from the frontend.
